name: ally_attacked_react
description: When an ally hero takes hero damage, do nearby bots react? v1: pinned focus-hero draft, ordinary Turbo game, score EVERY organic ally-attacked incident from the replay timeline (all-VERIFIED mechanisms; see docs/SCENARIO_TESTING.md sections 5.5 and 7). The disabled arena phase below is the v2 upgrade, pending the live-probe checklist (doc section 8).

launch.comment: Expectations for the launcher (soak_loop.sh-style); the driver does not start the server itself.

phases.comment: v2 arena shaping: empty mid + no fog. UNTESTED on our dedicated build (cvar class is LIKELY per docs/SCENARIO_TESTING.md section 3); enable after the live probe confirms both.

params.comment: Allies within 1200u of a hero taking hero damage must, within 3s, either act against the attacker's team (cast/deal hero damage) or reposition >=300u. min_react_rate is deliberately loose until the first baseline runs; ratchet upward afterwards.
